title: Official subtitles WITHOUT song lyrics
wikitext: []: Official subtitles WITHOUT song lyrics             Quote Post by sullivan003 » Sat Apr 18, 2020 4:01 am Does anyone know if these exist? For any of the films but especially 2.22, like the Funimation and/or Khara BD subs but without translated song lyrics? I just find them distracting from the visuals, especially in the Bardiel and Zeruel fights. Alternatively, .ass or .srt versions of the official subs so I can edit them? Might be a long shot but I figure some of y'all might know :/
